corrections.note: The participle form in the image is προσενεχθέντες, not προσενέγκαντες.
The transcription is missing the verse number 11 and has incorrect punctuation. The image reads 'ἅμα· 11καὶ'.
The image has a raised dot (·) after αἰχμαλωσίας.
The verb form in the image is ἐφάγοσαν, not ἔφαγον.
The verb form in the image is ἠγάγοσαν, not ἤγαγον.
The transcription misread the nomen sacrum for Israel (Ι̅Σ̅Λ̅) as 'του' and used the wrong bracket type. Swete uses vertical bars for this type of addition.
The transcription has garbled the apparatus entry. The image reads 'ἐστιν· B ἐστί·] A'.

notes: The transcription missed several verb forms (aorist indicative vs aorist indicative with -σαν suffix), a verse number, and some punctuation in the body. The apparatus had a misread nomen sacrum and a garbled entry.
